content.en:
The Fire Ancient Clan is very powerful, not only has a boundary-breaking genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, but also many Eight Blood Transformation Realms.

If it weren't for the Chaos Cave restricting the resources that were suitable for eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures to impact Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures, the Fire Gu Clan would definitely be able to give birth to Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

It is also that the Mixed Ruins Liquid is not suitable for the Fire Ancient Clan to impact the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, so there are not a lot of restrictions, but it is not given too much.

And the Fire Ancient Clan themselves couldn't extract the Mixed Ruins liquid from the Mixed Ruins Stone, otherwise they would have been able to extract a large amount of it themselves.

Ye Tian only snatched the Mixed Ruins Stone, as long as he snatched the Mixed Ruins Stone, he could take it back and hand it over to the Lord of Darkness to extract the Mixed Ruins Liquid, then he could obtain a large amount of Mixed Ruins Liquid.

"Even if the Fire Ancient Clan hands over the Mixed Ruins Stone, it is impossible to hand over all the Mixed Ruins Stone, they must have hidden a large number of Mixed Ruins Stone, I just need to find the treasure house of the Mixed Ruins Stone, and then snatch it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he secretly killed a Fire Ancient Clan's Blood Transformation Realm creature, and then copied the other party's body and blended into the Fire Ancient Clan.

What he killed was an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature, and it was his true body that copied his body, otherwise he couldn't kill it.

The Eight Blood Transformation Realm Fire Ancient Clan was already a high-level clan, so they had the authority to know a lot of secrets.

He had only been around for a while before he found out where the treasure trove was.

Of course, once it is struck, the Fire Ancient Clan will definitely report it, and it is estimated that it will attract the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses of the Chaos Cave at that time.

Therefore, he had to have the other replica bodies take over, sacrificing the real body to replicate the body.

Otherwise, even if he snatched the ruin stone, he wouldn't be able to take it with him.

this day.

Ye Tian was finally ready to make a move.

......

Ancient Fire Domain.

This is a treasure place of the Fire Ancient Clan, outsiders are not allowed to enter, and this is also the location of the treasure house, where the Mixed Ruins Stone is hidden.

Even the high-level didn't know how many Chaos Stone were stored here, maybe only the Boundary-Breaking genius of the Fire Ancient Clan would know.

In order to protect this treasure land, a large number of Fire Gu clansmen have been stationed here for a long time, and some of them have been transferred from time to time, so nothing has happened here!

Ye Tian's Fire Ancient Clan copied his body and applied to guard here, and after getting permission, he came to the Fire Ancient Domain on this day to guard it.

The Fire Ancient Domain has a large number of magic circles, which are easy to destroy only from the inside, so as to quickly break into the treasure house and save time for themselves.

So.

This Fire Ancient Clan's copy body also had to be sacrificed.

Soon, the copy body of the Fire Ancient Clan settled in the Fire Ancient Domain, and soon began to act.

Rumble!!!

The Fire Ancient Clan copies their bodies to attack the circle from within.

Click!!!

The magic circle shattered everywhere, and this scene completely stunned the other Fire Gu clansmen.

"Huo Tu, you're crazy!"

One by one, the Fire Ancient Clan roared.

However, Ye Tian, the copy body of the Fire Ancient Clan, ignored it and continued to destroy the magic circle.

Seeing this, the other Fire Gu clansmen besieged Ye Tian and wanted to take down his replica body.

Then.

Ye Tian's true body copy body appeared.

"Ancient Blood Spear!"

"Ancient God and Demon Fist!"

"Primordial!"

Ye Tian burst out the Ancient Technique of a Gate, and instantly killed this Fire Ancient Clan.

Then, he exploded with all his strength, and slammed into the remaining circles of the treasury with a single blow.

The magic circle here is indeed very good, and it may be arranged by the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval level geniuses of the Mixed Ruins Cave, so it is very strong.

If it weren't for his internal sabotage, it would have taken a lot of time to break in.

Soon.

Click!

The last layer of the circle was torn apart.

After that, he quickly broke into the treasure trove.

"So many treasures !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked by the wealth of the Fire Ancient Clan.

If it weren't for the suppression of the Chaos Cave, relying on these resources, the Fire Ancient Clan would be able to take off!

"It is worthy of being a crack in the boundary of the Hunhe River, and there are really many resources!"

Ye Tian sighed.

In addition to other resources, there are also the chaotic ruin stones that have piled up into small hills, which are even the accumulation of countless years of the Fire Ancient Clan, and they don't even know about the chaotic ruin cave.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"It's all received!"

Ye Tian took all the resources here and stored them in a void ball.

Then, he quickly fled.

As for the Fire Ancient Clan's copy body, it is responsible for breaking off, even if it can't be stopped for long, but it can be delayed a little.

Soon.

The large army of the Fire Gu Clan came and was intercepted by the Fire Gu Clan's copy body, but the copy body was quickly defeated.

At the same time, the Fire Ancient Clan also asked for help from the Chaos Cave.

......

Somewhere in the sea of ruins.

Ye Tian's other copy body met with the real copy body, took the void ball, and then slowly flew away in another direction.

And the real body copy body continued to escape, attracting the attention of the Fire Ancient Clan and the Chaos Cave.

Soon, the real replica body was discovered.

Cave of the Ruins.

A Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Genius, the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor, received a summons from the Fire Ancient Clan, and learned that an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Genius had invaded the Fire Ancient Clan, and was not a Heavenly Ancestor of the Chaos Sea, and even had a somewhat strange aura, which was incompatible with heaven and earth.

"Incompatible with heaven and earth, could it be the Heavenly Ancestor of the Territorial Sea Boundary Crack? Recently, it was indeed mentioned above, there may be a Heavenly Ancestor of the Territorial Sea Boundary Crack breaking into the Hunhe River Boundary Crack, it seems that it really appeared!"

The Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

If the bone transformation realm existed, he would not dare to provoke it.

But a mere eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius dared to invade the racial forces under the command of the Chaos Cave, and he simply didn't take the Chaos Cave in his eyes.

Thereupon.

He immediately set off from the Chaos Cave and chased Ye Tian away.

......

Somewhere in the sea of ruins.

When Ye Tian's true body was about to escape from the Sea of Mixed Ruins, a Nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius stopped Ye Tian.

"Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe and know the other party's face from the other party's talent.

What surprised him even more was that this Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor also had an Ancient Grade Ancestral Endowment.

Obviously, the Blood Transformation Realm race that this Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor came from must be extremely powerful.

【Ancient Ancestral Endowment: Blood】

In an instant, the two sides were fighting.

Burst!

The other party cast a bloody hand-type primeval technique, and a blow penetrated Ye Tian's primeval golden light cover, directly knocking Ye Tian through his body.

Although the blow did not kill him, Ye Tian soon couldn't bear it and was directly blown up.

"Hey, didn't you say that you robbed the treasure, why didn't you have anything?"

The Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor was puzzled.

However, he still sent a message to the Fire Ancient Clan, saying that the enemy had been killed by him.

At this time, the patriarch of the Fire Ancient Clan, the boundary-breaking genius Fire Desolation, asked the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor: "Lord Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor, can you return some of the resources that the enemy stole to us, and the rest should be regarded as filial piety to the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor!"

"If you don't find your treasure, he must have thrown it away, so you can find it along the way!"

Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor said.

He also searched along the way, but he didn't find it, so he couldn't do anything.

But when Huo Huang heard this, he didn't think so in his heart.

"Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor, you are too greedy, so many treasure resources, the accumulation of our Fire Ancient Clan for countless years, you are all greedy!!"

The fire was furious.
